dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, for too long {quest_threat} has ground {quest_stakes} into the dirt. {quest_origin} have pushed people past their breaking point.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We intend to {quest_action} and challenge the authority at {quest_focus}. But we need supplies first. Gather {quest_item} from {location_hint} so we can prepare. The {enemy_type} serving the overseer patrol the roads.
dialogueChunks.outro: This is not recklessness: it is survival. Without change, there is nothing left for us here.

playerResponses.text: Tyranny should always be challenged. I will help you prepare.
Revolts are messy. Are you sure about this?
I do not pick sides in local politics.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_threat} has held {quest_stakes} under their boot for too long. They rule through fear and force, but they have a weakness.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} {quest_time_pressure}. Their strength depends on {quest_focus}, and without it, their grip loosens. The {enemy_type} guard the area {location_hint}. Bring back any {quest_item} you can seize.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we cut their supply line, the people will find the courage to stand up. This is how it starts.

playerResponses.text: Strike at their supplies, break their hold. Smart plan.
How many guards are we talking about?
Poking a warlord sounds like a death sentence.

dialogueChunks.intro: Keep your voice down, {player_name}. Since {quest_origin} began draining us dry, {quest_stakes} have been organizing in secret. {quest_threat} are everywhere.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need someone the patrols do not recognize to {quest_action} to {quest_focus}. It is {location_hint}. Pick up {quest_item} on the way: the resistance needs them.
dialogueChunks.outro: If {quest_threat} intercept this message, people will die. But if it gets through, everything changes. You would earn {quest_reward_hint}.

playerResponses.text: I can move unseen. Give me the message.
Courier work through hostile territory. What is in it for me?
I am no revolutionary. Find someone else.
